name: Honor Debt
description: Has a debt that must be repaid.

name: Indoor Discomfort
description: -1 Spike and Power damage while inside.

name: Nightmares
description: Has penalties after an in-game event causes nightmares.

name: Outdoor Discomfort
description: -1 Spike and Power damage while outdoors.

name: Fragile Bones
description: Treats Effects with Force Accent as Final.

name: Dies Alone
description: Unconscious and cannot call out when dying.

name: Divine Vulnerability
description: Treats Effects with Divine Accent as Final.

name: Mild Allergy
description: Minor allergy to gold, silver, iron, magic or other substances. Cannot rest or heal efficiently while in contact.

name: Severe Allergy
description: Severe allergy to gold, silver, iron, magic or other substances. Suffers severe pain and Drained while in contact.

name: Shunned Soul
description: While on Consecrated Ground, cannot benefit from Short Rests.

name: Disquieting Aura
description: Cannot Cure Berserk, Charmed, or Repelled Conditions.

name: Torn Soul
description: Only ever heals 1 point from any source of Healing.

name: Truthbound
description: Cannot speak lies nor deceive others. Takes Final Damage if they speak a lie.

name: Binding Oath of Charity
description: Swears Oath to protect and champion the poor and oppressed. Cannot keep goods other than for survival.

name: Binding Oath of Chastity
description: Swears Oath to not have sexual or romantic relationships with others.

name: Binding Oath of Civility
description: Swears Oath to treat others with respect and civility.

name: Binding Oath of Honor
description: Swears Oath to be fair in your dealings, to not cheat, and to be honorable in your actions.

name: Binding Oath of Peace
description: Swears Oath to not end life, to prevent other lives from being ended and to only fight in self-defense.
